name: codex-intercom
description: Codex MCP plugin for direct local messaging with Pi and Codex coding-agent sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local Codex and Pi sessions
interface.longDescription: Codex Intercom provides direct 1:1 local messaging for coding-agent sessions through MCP tools for listing sessions, sending messages, asking questions, replying to pending asks, and checking pending messages.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Intercom to coordinate with another local coding-agent session
